privileged_info_summary: The task references a facility named 'Valley Industrial Supply' which does not exist in any of the provided XML data files. The data contains only synthetic facilities: Montpelier Industrial Supply, Richmond Processing Plant, Champlain Plastics and Composites, Northfield Paper Mill, Essex Wire and Cable, Green Valley Water Facility, Essex Chemical and Coatings, and Lakeside Chemical Supply. Of the three required chemicals, Sulfuric Acid and Anhydrous Ammonia (recorded as 'Ammonia, Anhydrous') are present in various facilities, but Diesel Fuel is not found in any facility's chemical inventory. The data includes 2024 reporting year data for most facilities, with one facility (Green Valley Water Facility) from 2019. This is synthetic test data created for an AI agent training environment (Gym-Anything).
